name: narrator: location continuity guard after departure

source.purpose: Regression from 260430 Playthrough SO Pursuit: after the ship cleared the station, later Narrator turns reintroduced station-side clamps/inspection/concourse affordances. The per-turn delta must inject a private guard once state says the ship has departed.
